title: Microservices Architecture
description: Decompose domains into independently deployable services with clear ownership and contracts.

title: Event-Driven Architecture
description: Use messaging and asynchronous workflows to decouple systems and absorb traffic spikes.

title: API Gateway
description: Centralize routing, authentication, throttling, and versioning for client-facing services.

title: Database Optimization
description: Balance normalization, indexing, partitioning, and read-write strategies for scale.

title: Background Jobs
description: Move heavy or time-tolerant workloads into resilient queues and scheduled workers.

title: Distributed Caching
description: Improve response time and protect downstream systems with coordinated cache design.

title: Observability
description: Instrument logs, metrics, tracing, and alerts to support proactive operations.

title: Scalability & Reliability
description: Engineer for graceful degradation, recovery, and predictable performance under growth.
